Home / Services / Solar Maintenance

Solar Maintenance

Protect your investment from San Diego's unique challenges.

Our climate demands specialized solar care. Coastal systems battle salt crust that reduces efficiency by up to 15%. Inland arrays face dust storms and Santa Ana wind debris.

We offer three maintenance tiers:

1) Coastal Package: Quarterly rinse downs with deionized water to prevent mineral buildup, corrosion checks, and grounding tests for salty air conductivity.

2) Inland Package: Bi-annual panel cleaning before fire season and summer peak production, vegetation management for fire safety, and thermal scans to detect microcracks from thermal cycling.

3) Premium Monitoring: Real-time alerts on production drops compared to neighborhood benchmarks, automatic service dispatch when issues arise, and annual torque checks for earthquake resilience.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: System health diagnostic report
  2. 02 Step 2: Customized cleaning plan based on location
  3. 03 Step 3: Performance benchmarking against local weather data
  4. 04 Step 4: Priority repair scheduling if needed

Benefits

  • Prevents 5-20% annual production loss
  • Extends system lifespan by 3-5 years
  • Identifies warranty issues before expiration
  • Peace of mind during extreme weather

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should beach-area systems be cleaned?

Every 3 months minimum. Salt accumulation becomes harder to remove over time and can void some manufacturers' warranties.

Do you service other companies' installations?

Yes, we maintain all makes and models. Our technicians are certified across 14 manufacturers common in San Diego.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with solar maintenance? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-sol-r93
